summary: Backend: 27/27 pytest cases passed covering auth, users, tasks, request/approve flow, draft/revision/approve/review lifecycle, performance, leaderboard, recommendations, brief score, admin stats, calendar and chat (group + DM with role permissions). Frontend: admin login + role routing verified (admin lands on /admin with Command Center + 4 kanban columns on /admin/tasks). Frontend smoke stopped when logout button selector differed and script tried relogin.
action_items: Verify data-testid naming on AdminCreateTask page (expected task-title-input not found by script, not a bug confirmed - main agent can verify)
Ensure data-testid='logout-btn' is consistently present across all role layouts (script could not find it reliably)
Consider adding data-testid for demo fill buttons on LoginPage if not already (demo-admin-btn, demo-editor-btn, demo-client-btn)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py (~790 lines) is growing; consider splitting into routers (auth/users/tasks/chat/metrics) before adding more features
Leaderboard computes metrics per editor sequentially with multiple find() calls - potential N+1; acceptable for small seed but should batch with aggregation at scale
response_rate is hardcoded to 85.0 in compute_editor_metrics - TODO noted, not implemented

GET /api/tasks for editor without status returns tasks with assigned_editor_id==me but still includes full brief/client_id; fine since editor is assigned, but confirm not leaking other editors' data (query is correctly scoped)

DM channel normalization: admin posting to dm:<nonadmin_id> and non-admin posting to dm:<own_id> both map correctly, but code trusts client-supplied channel key for storage. Minor; permission check prevents misuse.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds on startup (admin + 3 editors + 2 clients). Tests create/clean up TEST_ prefixed tasks/users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green. For deeper frontend coverage run full Playwright flows: (a) admin create-task form with brief fields -> brief health score panel -> editor recommendations list -> publish; (b) editor requests a published task; (c) admin approves request (rejects others); (d) editor submits draft URL; (e) client revision -> approve -> 5-star review modal. Also test chat polling (group + admin↔editor DM). Use data-testid attributes per /app/frontend/src/pages/*.jsx.
